reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.positives: Big room
reviews.negatives:
I have some things to say about this hotel. First of all, it's advertised as a four-star hotel with excellent photos, but when I checked in, I realized the so-called ocean-view room was misleading. While technically facing the sea, two other hotels stand directly in front of mine, leaving only a narrow sliver of ocean visible between them. As for the bed linens, towels, and other fabrics, they were far below the standard expected of a four-star establishment. Regardless of age or wear, the sheets and covers had strange stains. Even after requesting replacements, the new ones were still dirty—truly unpleasant to sleep on.  

The bathroom amenities were awful 👎, completely unworthy of a four-star rating. I honestly don’t understand how this place earned such a classification. The bathroom design is also flawed—poorly executed wet-dry separation means that during longer showers, water spills out all over the floor, making the whole room wet and inconvenient. It’s incredibly frustrating and poorly thought out.  

Lastly, the staff service was mediocre at best—no warm welcome, no professional attitude. I won’t be coming back here ever again!!!

reviews.title: Unclean bathroom
reviews.positives: The location was superb, really next to the beach and there are restaurants nearby. It's just a bit far from Cam Ranh Airport, but within the city center. The staff were helpful, the price was very affordable.
reviews.negatives:
Cleanliness was the biggest issue. The bathroom had lots of moldy dark spots along the grout lines, which showed how little attention they give to cleaning. It looked so bad that I ended up buying a bottle of Zim bathroom cleaner and using their free toothbrush just to clean it myself. The dirt even stretched to the side of the bathtub, visible through the glass window. The bed linens were itchy, and to make it worse, there was a used bamboo stick left inside the fridge. The price may be low, but management should at least make sure the rooms and bathrooms are properly cleaned. On top of that, they didn’t provide soap or shampoo. The dispensers in the bathroom were empty, old, and dirty.

Food buffet was okay, but they don't replenish them right away.

reviews.title: False early check in advertisement
reviews.positives: The room was clean. We did get an ocean view room, what we had requested... but the hotel location is a couple blocks away from the beach, the view was limited to what you could see between two other buildings. So it wasn't exactly beach front.
reviews.negatives: We specifically picked this hotel because they offered early check in. We were taking a bus in and knew that we would get to Nha Trang early and wanted the flexibility to check in early. We emailed the hotel 3 days before we were supposed to arrive asking if we can check in early. We were even happy to spend the extra money to be able to do so. No reply. We got to the hotel 3 days later and headed there hoping we can talk to someone. The girl at the front explained to us that we could not in fact check in early and we would need to wait 6 more hours before she can get us a room. Without much of a choice we decided to go to a coffee shop and wait it out. 3 hours later, we got a message from the hotel (generic) asking us when we are going to arrive and that they offer early check in... So we headed back into the hotel to see 4 separate other parties in the same situation as we were in. They all had asked to check in early but that was not an option. We watched as everyone got a room before us. The only explanation we were given was that the type of room we had booked was not available. I would have been happy to downgrade or upgrade if the option was given if we could have gotten into a room sooner rather than later.

reviews.title: Bad service
reviews.text:
I stayed here one time and now came back but disappointed. 
I requested on Agoda a big bed but they a twin bed room. 
It’s been raining and i just asked to borrow the receptionist (a make staff) for an umbrella for just 5’ but he refused even though i saw an available umbrella behind the Reception Counter. 

Will never stay at this hotel again.

reviews.title: Can do better.
reviews.positives: Beds were comfortable.
reviews.negatives: Windows are grimy and filthy. My request for one bed was 'approved' but apparently this is the same as having two single beds pushed together. Uncomfortable. Top floor gym equipment is trash.

reviews.title: Below average stay
reviews.text:
When we first arrived it was like bed sheets, bath robes and towels weren't even changed. All of them were dirty, with big and visible stains, towels ragged, bed covers had shoe marks on them (how?!). All of those mistakes were only on the second try, because first time staff brought towels that were as dirty as the ones that were in the room when we arrived. After that incident housekeeping was decent but towels and such weren't mint condition, most of them had small barely seen stains. 

Our room description said "bath AND shower" but room had only shower in it. Staff said that they only have rooms with one of above, which makes it false advertising.

About shower. Most of the time "hot" water was at least room temperature. Sometimes if we waited for 10-15 minutes there would be truly hot water, but i don't think this situation acceptable for 4-star hotel. 

You would think that location of hotel is good, sea view, about 100-200 metres to beach, but in fact there's nothing note-worthy around hotel for a 1-2 kilometres. Only shitty tourist shops and cafes. 

Breakfast is rather cheap (120k dong) and decent, but lacks variety, although maybe they do mix it up, but we didn't notice in 2 days we had breakfast.

Staff is okay, but some of them were rather indifferent to us, although everything we asked for was done. Agoda page claims staff speaks Russian, but i doubt that as i never heard them speak it, their English is okay though.
reviews.response:
Dear Mark, 
Thank you for choosing our hotel. Your valuable comments are the basis for us to increasingly improve service and service quality. Thanks to your input, the hotel will fix this problem. We're sorry if that made your experience less than perfect. And look forward to making it up to you next time. 
Sincerely - Lucky Sun Team.

reviews.title: Above average
reviews.positives:
Great location. Close to the beach, lots and lots of eating places within walking distance, many super/ mini markets close by, no dearth of massage parlours.
The neighborhood was very safe and with a great vibe.
The breakfast was good with many choices. Clean and well maintained dining hall.
reviews.negatives:
The room didn't have enough space to open two suitcases. The safe deposit was in the bottom of the cupboard at floor level and was very difficult to access by elderly people like us as you have to kneel down on the floor to set the code.
The bathroom had smelly towels. The hotel doesn't provide a replaceable bath mat but instead a very dirty rubber mat is provided.
The water pressure was very low and during our stay we just managed to have a lukewarm/ cold water bath. No hot water. 
The floor was not clean for to walk around without slippers.

reviews.title: Above average
reviews.text:
- Nv lễ tân thiếu linh động, đành rằng quy định là 14h check in nhưng cũng nên linh động cho khách đang chờ đợi được check in dần dần khi có phòng trống. Đằng này, 1 số đoàn khách phải ngồi đợi từ sáng/trưa tại sảnh để được check-in, đến sát 14h xuất hiện thêm vài  đoàn đến sau thì lại đc check in trước, trong khi khách đã ngồi đợi từ sáng thì nhân viên không gọi.

Kính gửi chị Trang, Cảm ơn quý khách đã lựa chọn khách sạn của chúng tôi. 
Những ý kiến đóng góp quý báu của quý khách là cơ sở để chúng tôi ngày càng nâng cao chất lượng dịch vụ và dịch vụ. 
Về việc nhận phòng, vì lí do trong thời gian cao điểm, và khách sạn phải giao đúng hạn phòng cho quý khách nên thời gian nhận phòng còn tuỳ thuộc vào thời gian khách trước trả phòng. Và nhờ ý kiến đóng góp của quý khách, khách sạn đã kịp thời khắc phục vấn đề nhà vệ sinh. Chúng tôi rất tiếc và xin lỗi quý khách nếu điều đó khiến trải nghiệm của quý khách kém hoàn hảo. Rất mong được bù đắp cho quý khách vào lần sau. 
Trân trọng - Lucky Sun

Dear Mr Nhat
Thank you for your review of our hotel
We have recorded your information about the above incident
According to regulations, check in time is 2pm - check out 12 am
The receptionist assisted me with a free late check out of 1pm, which is 1 hour before the scheduled time
The fact that I checked out 13 minutes late, which is 1:13 p.m., will delay the next guest's check-in.
According to our staff, we only follow the regulations and also support customers with a fee of 30% of the price the customer paid with our hotel.
Thank you for your comments about our hotel and we apologize for this unwanted experience

reviews.title: Budget friendly with basic needs meet
reviews.text:
This hotel is a fantastic option for a budget-friendly trip to Nha Trang. It's in a great location and provides all the basic necessities for a comfortable stay. The breakfast was also excellent.

While our overall experience was positive, a few service and maintenance issues were noted that could be improved upon. We found the reception and restaurant service to be a bit unresponsive. We had to ask three times for slippers, and the waiter at the buffet seemed to ignore our questions.

In our room, the shower gel was not refilled during our three-night stay, and the bedside lamp was broken. We also noticed that coffee wasn't replenished by housekeeping. Another small issue was the slow drainage in the bathroom sink, which took a long time to drain after use.

That said, the shower itself worked wonderfully, with a precise hot and cold system. The toilet was also surprisingly efficient. I would definitely recommend this hotel for its value and location

Breakfast was 90% vietnamese  - fried noodles, pork stew, fried rice etc (fair enough we are in Vietnam! But in this heavy tourist area most hotels cater to a range of visitors). Outside of this choice was a peice of fruit, egg, bad sliced bread, but the coffee was decent. 

 Breakfast staff also a bit unfriendly / inflexible e.g. one morning my partner was sick and so could not come to the breakfast buffet for the obvious reason of risking infecting other guests. I politely requested to be allowed to take him a peice of fruit to the room but staff insisted he must come up himself and eat it there despite the risk to other guests.

reviews.title: Very happy with this hotel
reviews.positives:
Very well located set back 50 m from main beach road which makes it a bit quieter- drivers use their horns all the time here. I had sea view room which technically is correct but the view is through the gap between two buildings in front and either side TBH no probs with that after initial surprise- in fact it made me chuckle. Room had everything promised modern in good condition comfy bed overall impressed. Cleaned well every day. All the staff were very nice always with a smile. Didn’t experience any Russians staying here.Mainly Chinese and europeans.The hotel is 1 minute from beach and restaurants and shops are all around. The walk into central Nha Trang is 10 minutes. 
Really at the price point of this place I have to give it a 10/10. I did my research and it’s very cheap compared to others. The one next door and in front was 6x the price!!! Madness 
The best validation I can give is that I extended my stay here. Good hotel fantastic value for money.
reviews.negatives: Like anywhere you’re at the mercy of other guests for a good nights sleep.Chinese people above me were noisy.Scraping chairs on the floor at ungodly hours. The hotel was very accommodating and gave me a room with no one above me so then it was fine.

reviews.title: A pleasant stay within walking distance from the beach and with easy access to town
reviews.positives:
- The overall room was comfortable and clean, with a view of the sea
- Within walking distance from many convenience stores and the beach (including beachfront restaurants and bars)
- Relatively close to town, which is about 10-15 mins away by Grab/ taxi depending on the location
- They have a spa which provides various massage options. They also have a gym and a pool.
reviews.negatives:
- Some of the amenities did not seem like they were replenished after the previous guest (e.g. toilet roll was used, tissue box was half full)
- No hand soap was provided in the bathroom
- There were two soap dispensers by the bathtub, but they weren't labelled, so we weren't sure if they were shampoo or body soap

reviews.title: Deserving of a 4-star hotel.
reviews.text: We went to relax after long days of running KPI. The room is not spacious, but it has a sea view, the room temperature cools down quickly, the elevator is fast, YouTube is strong, the space is luxurious and high-end, the location is easy to access, right in the center, but the bathtub is a bit old. Overall, it was very satisfactory, 8/10. I just want to suggest that when customers want to check in early at 12:00, the reception should inform the guests early if there are available rooms to help them arrange their schedule. We didn't know if early check-in was possible even though we contacted in advance, so we arrived at 13:00 to find a room ready for us. But if we come back, we still recommend this hotel, it is very deserving.

reviews.title: Really cute.
reviews.text: This hotel surprised me. The room had a ginormous round bed in it, and looked just like the pics. Beautiful room, high floor. Loved the lighting and there was a nice tub. Unfortunately the jets in the tub didn’t work but that wasn’t major. The hotel is back from the street so there is no unobstructed ocean view, you get peeks from behind the Queen Anne hotel in front. But it’s a 3 min walk across the street. Central to most things. Plenty of restaurants, great smoothie place right outside the door. A few feet. I don’t like that there is no way to know what’s in the soap dispensers in the shower. Shampoo and conditioner or bath gel? Who knows? Nothings labeled. The pool area is also tiny and not that attractive. I didn’t partake. Front desk staff and housekeeping were nice and I would recommend staying for sure.

reviews.text:
Disadvantages:
1. The toilet has a slight smell (it only comes up occasionally, not all the time)
2. The air conditioner is not very cold (I set it to 18 degrees, the lowest, but it's still not very cold)

Advantages:
1. Close to Tran Phu beach
2. Staff are enthusiastic, friendly, and professional
3. Comfortable to store luggage during check-in and check-out
Additionally, being close to the beach is the biggest advantage, while places to eat and entertain like Vincom or famous restaurants are a bit out of the way.

reviews.title: Affordable, limited car parking, no hand soap
reviews.text:
PROS:
The hotel is well maintained.  The rooms are clean. Hard flooring, perfect for guests with environmental allergies. Nice interior designs

CONS:
I find it strange that they don’t provide hand soap which is a necessity. Shower gel was almost empty when I received the room. Limited car parking space. The alley to the hotel most of the time is filled with pedestrians and cyclos so it takes time to reach the hotel/parking space by a car. Upon arrival, we were told by the the front desk staff that someone would guide us to the parking space but we waited and no one showed up so we ended up looking for the parking lot by ourselves

reviews.title: Good Location, but Service Needs Improvement
reviews.text:
The hotel offers good value for money, with a great location just a short walk from the beach and in city center. The room was clean and comfortable, but my request for a mix of twin and double rooms was overlooked. However, I felt the staff could use more training. While they were polite, their lack of experience and hospitality was noticeable, which made the service feel a bit underwhelming.

Overall, a good budget choice if you’re looking for a convenient and clean stay.

reviews.title: Todo estaba bien al menos el momento de cucarachas y que mi pelo sido verde después de la piscina
reviews.positives:
Las vistas al mar muy bonitas. Está bien ubicado. El personal de limpieza y del restaurante muy amable. 
El chico de recepción que lleva gafas es el único que se atiende bien y la verdad ayuda. 
Hotel es bastante bueno, habitación grande.
reviews.negatives:
Cucarachas en mi habitación. Parece que nadie se hacía bien la limpieza en la habitación porque vivían bastante tiempo y ya tenían casa en el baño y dentro de la mesa (porque ya habían muy pequeños y muchos huevos). Lo que tenía que avisar tres veces para que hace algo de verdad y pasan desinfectar y limpiar. 
Ah claro y el comentario que hay que quitar basura. Os digo que hay que hacer mejor la limpieza. Porque en el baño donde estaba casa de cucarachas era de bajo de plato negro donde ponen cosas de higiene. 

También aviso que las chicas rubias tienen cuidado con el agua en la piscina, se meten cobre para quitar flor del agua y tu pelo se puede hacer verde. 

En resumen, la chica en lobby que lleva gafas nada profesional, solo hace la cara de sorprendida y nunca puede ayudar. No se como está trabajando de cara pública.

reviews.title: Great hotel!
reviews.text:
We stayed at the hotel for four nights. Although there was an unexpected issue during our stay, the hotel manager, Mr. Hoàng, handled the situation with great professionalism and took full responsibility to make things right.

This was our first time staying at a 3-star hotel in Nha Trang, and we were truly impressed by the service quality. The staff were friendly and attentive—especially the housekeeping team, who worked with great care and dedication. When I had a concern, they immediately took action to resolve it. We sincerely appreciate their efforts and professionalism.

The hotel enjoys a very convenient location, just a short walk from the beach. Despite being in a lively tourist area, the hotel itself is remarkably peaceful. The rooms are quite new, elegantly decorated, and impeccably clean—you won’t even find dust in the smallest corners.
We were very pleased with our stay and will definitely choose Lucky Sun Hotel again the next time we visit Nha Trang.

The hotel has a beautiful and convenient location. Although it is situated in an alley, you can go straight to the beach. The crosswalk to the road is about 2 meters from the hotel entrance. From the hotel, you can see the sea directly, although it is a bit far, it's safe to say the view is beautiful.

The food is diverse, different every day, with no repeats.

The pool on the 23rd floor is very empty, and everything is okay. The room isn't really clean, and some areas are a bit old. If those issues were fixed, I would give it a perfect score.

reviews.title: Nous n'avons pas pu nous reposer dans cet hôtel
reviews.positives: La chambre et le petit déjeuner n'étaient pas mauvais.
reviews.negatives:
Expérience CATASTROPHIQUE.
Si vous ne supportez pas l'odeur de la fumette ou si vous ne voulez pas que vos affaires sentent la cigarette, évitez cet hôtel à tout prix.

Malgré le fait que fumer n'est pas autorisé dans les chambres, je n'ai passé qu'une nuit sans incident sur les cinq nuits passées au Lucky Sun Hotel, même après un changement de chambre. De plus, impossible de localiser la provenance de la fumée car elle infeste votre chambre depuis la canalisation de la salle de bain.

Mon séjour dans cet hôtel m'a rendu malade car les incidents survenaient toujours après minuit où je devais me battre avec la réception pour obtenir de l'aide, mais sans succès. Suite à cela, ils ont même eu l'audace de m'accuser d'être le fumeur.

Mon séjour à Nha Trang a été fortement perturbé par le temps perdu, le manque de sommeil et m'a rendu malade.

Il en va de soit que je n'ai eu aucune compensation. Mais l'hôtel a proposé de rembourser une nuit d'hôtel pour enlever les avis négatifs, ce qui est honteux.

reviews.positives: L’établissement est bien situé proche de la plage et les fournitures sont de bonne qualité
reviews.negatives:
Je trouve que le personnel à l’accueil et ceux qui répondent sur l’application Booking sont très peu sympathiques. 

1) Le premier contact que j’ai eu avec eux c’était pour me menacer d’annuler ma réservation car ils n’arrivaient pas à me joindre par téléphone (or que l’on peut discuter sur booking ou par mail) … 

2) Je leur ai demandé de me retirer une nuit car malheureusement j’arrivais un jour plus tard (car je voyage en bus) ils ne voulaient pas. Au point où c’était le service client Booking qui a dû batailler avec eux.

3) Durant mon séjour, je suis tombée malade. J’ai demandé à la réception si je pouvais commander quelque chose à manger (juste du riz avec un peu de légume). Ils m’ont dit que la cuisine était fermée, alors qu’il n’était que 17h et que selon leur livret de chambre il était possible de commander à manger en dehors du petit déjeuner. 

Ceci dit, les femmes de chambres étaient très gentilles et à l’écoute.

reviews.title: Willingness of staff
reviews.text: During our recent trip to Nha Trang, one of my companions experienced the unfortunate loss of her mobile device. To our great relief, the local staff demonstrated exceptional hospitality by diligently assisting us in locating the missing phone. Their willingness to go above and beyond, even though the phone was ultimately recovered, left a profound sense of gratitude and appreciation within me.

J’ai eu un problème d’évier bouché, j’ai croisé une femme de ménage à qui j’en ai fait part et en quelques secondes le problème était résolu.

reviews.title: If you are looking for a budget-friendly hotel in Nha Trang, I highly recommend this place!
reviews.text: I have stayed here for 3 weeks because I really like this place. Initially, I only booked a few days and planned to move, but I couldn't find a more affordable hotel that I liked better than this one, so somehow I ended up staying for 3 weeks, haha. The staff are all very friendly, the room conditions are good, and most importantly, it's nice to enjoy an ocean view with breakfast at such a low price. Everything is great except for the location and the fact that the soundproofing isn't very good. There are two dogs in the basement, and they are so cute and lovable. I want to see them again💕
